WorkflowDefinition.Name: WF_U016_Ctrl_32_V2
WorkflowDefinition.Description: Dev : U-016 Date : 13/01/2026 Evolution: WF_U016_Ctrl_32_V2 Date: 11/03/2026

FlowPart.Name: MWS410MI.GetHead
FlowPart.IonApiMethod: {"productLogicalId":"infor.m3","operationProxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/MWS410MI","operationRestPath":"/GetHead","productName":"M3","operationPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/MWS410MI/GetHead","summary":"Get Delivery head information","httpMethod":"GET","availableOutputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentType":"JSON","input":[{"wfVariableName":"CONO","literalValue":null,"name":"CONO","description":"Company(3)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"DLIX","literalValue":null,"name":"DLIX","description":"Delivery number(11)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"CONA","description":"Consignee(10)","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"PUTP","description":"Delivery note reference qualifier(1)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"PUSN","description":"Delivery note reference(17)","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"CONO","literalValue":null,"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"locale","description":"The locale to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"timeZone","description":"The time zone to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"maxrecs","description":"Max number of records returned. 0 is unlimited","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"dateformat","description":"Date format to use","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"excludeempty","description":"When true, empty fields are omitted in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"righttrim","description":"When true, all values are right trimmed in response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"returncols","description":"A comma separated list of column names that should be included in the response. Defaults to all columns","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"}],"output":[{"wfVariableName":"PLSX","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records[0].PLSX","optional":false}],"inputBody":{"name":null,"description":null,"required":false,"availableInputContentTypes":[],"inputContentType":null,"body":" ","ignore":true,"structureNamesFromBody":[],"variableNamesFromBody":[]}}

FlowPart.Name: MWS423MI.PackPickList
FlowPart.IonApiMethod: {"productLogicalId":"infor.m3","operationProxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/MWS423MI","operationRestPath":"/PackPicklist","productName":"M3","operationPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/MWS423MI/PackPicklist","summary":"Pack reporting for a complete picking list","httpMethod":"GET","availableOutputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentType":"JSON","input":[{"wfVariableName":"CONO","literalValue":null,"name":"CONO","description":"Company(3)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"DLIX","literalValue":null,"name":"DLIX","description":"Delivery number(11)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"PLSX","literalValue":null,"name":"PLSX","description":"Picking list suffix(3)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"CONO","literalValue":null,"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to all columns","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"}],"output":[],"inputBody":{"name":null,"description":null,"required":false,"availableInputContentTypes":[],"inputContentType":null,"body":" ","ignore":true,"structureNamesFromBody":[],"variableNamesFromBody":[]}}

FlowPart.Name: qeryBuilder_colisage
FlowPart.MultipleAssignmentsConfiguration: [{"assignmentType":"EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT","expression":"\"OQDLIX from MHDISH where OQPGRS = 50 and OQDCC1 = 900 and OQPIST = 10\"","treePath":null,"variableName":"qery_colisage","personFullName":null}]

FlowPart.Name: EXPORTMI.MHDISH_colisage
FlowPart.IonApiMethod: {"productLogicalId":"infor.m3","operationProxyPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/EXPORTMI","operationRestPath":"/Select","productName":"M3","operationPath":"M3/m3api-rest/v2/execute/EXPORTMI/Select","summary":"Select","httpMethod":"GET","availableOutputContentTypes":["JSON"],"outputContentType":"JSON","input":[{"wfVariableName":"qery_colisage","literalValue":null,"name":"QERY","description":"Query statement(982)","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":true,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":",","name":"SEPC","description":"Separator character or blank for flat file(1)","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"HDRS","description":"Include headers, 1 or 0 or blank(1)","swaggerDatatype":"number","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":"CONO","literalValue":null,"name":"cono","description":"The company context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"divi","description":"The division context to use. Defaults to user default","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"lanc","description":"The language code to use. Defaults to all columns","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"format","description":"Controls output JSON format","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"extendedresult","description":"Show transaction parameters in the response","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"QUERY"},{"wfVariableName":null,"literalValue":null,"name":"positionkey","description":"The position in a table to start reading from","swaggerDatatype":"string","swaggerFormat":null,"required":false,"type":"HEADER"}],"output":[{"wfVariableName":"outputLstDelivery","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records","optional":true},{"wfVariableName":"lengthLstDelivery","type":"BODY","path":"$.results[0].records.length()","optional":false}],"inputBody":{"name":null,"description":null,"required":false,"availableInputContentTypes":[],"inputContentType":null,"body":" ","ignore":true,"structureNamesFromBody":[],"variableNamesFromBody":[]}}

FlowPart.Name: qeryBuilder
FlowPart.MultipleAssignmentsConfiguration: [{"assignmentType":"EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT","expression":"\"OQDLIX from MHDISH where OQPGRS < 50 and OQDCC1 = 900\"","treePath":null,"variableName":"qery","personFullName":null}]

FlowPart.Name: GetnIteration
FlowPart.Description: script to define api call for n record

FlowPart.Name: IPS
FlowPart.IonApiMethod:
{"productLogicalId":"infor.m3","operationProxyPath":"M3/ips/service","operationRestPath":"/U016_MWS410","productName":"M3","operationPath":"M3/ips/service/U016_MWS410","summary":"Execute IPS service U016_MWS410 (method MWS410)","httpMethod":"POST","availableOutputContentTypes":["XML"],"outputContentType":"XML","input":[],"output":[],"inputBody":{"name":"body","description":"The XML SOAP request","required":true,"availableInputContentTypes":["XML"],"inputContentType":"XML","body":"<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8" standalone="no"?>
<SOAP-ENV:Envelope xmlns:SOAP-ENV="http://schemas.xmlsoap.org/soap/envelope/" xmlns:cred="http://lawson.com/ws/credentials" xmlns:mws="http://schemas.infor.com/ips/U016_MWS410/MWS410">
 <SOAP-ENV:Header>
 <cred:lws>
 <!--Optional:-->
 <cred:company>$value(CONO)</cred:company>
 <!--Optional:-->
 <cred:division>$value(DIVI)</cred:division>
 </cred:lws>
 </SOAP-ENV:Header>
 <SOAP-ENV:Body>
 <mws:MWS410>
 <mws:MWS410>
 <!--Optional:-->
 <mws:SortingOrder>7</mws:SortingOrder>
 <!--Optional:-->
 <mws:Option>32</mws:Option>
 <!--Optional:-->
 <mws:FilterValue>$value(DLIX)</mws:FilterValue>
 </mws:MWS410>
 </mws:MWS410>
 </SOAP-ENV:Body>
</SOAP-ENV:Envelope>","ignore":false,"structureNamesFromBody":[],"variableNamesFromBody":["CONO","DLIX","DIVI"]}}
